description.overview: The Lhasa Apso served as sentinels in Tibetan monasteries and palaces for over a thousand years.
description.temperament: Lhasas are confident, sometimes stubborn, and loyal to family. Reserved with strangers.
description.health: Prone to eye problems, kidney issues, and hip dysplasia.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play sessions.

verdict.summary: Confident Tibetan sentinels in a small package. Lhasas are loyal and make good watchdogs but need extensive grooming and patient training.
